biography_short: Hija de Pelayo; casó con Alfonso I y aparece en las fuentes como nexo dinástico entre Pelayo y la casa de Alfonso.

visual_profile.clothing: noblewoman attire; practical but with modest jewelry typical of 8th-century aristocracy
visual_profile.style_notes: reinforce familial/dynastic link between Pelayo and Alfonso I; clothing should be conservative and regionally plausible.

must_avoid: Assigning political actions not attested in the source

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Role as dynastic connector and survivor of turbulent succession moments.

arc_state.external_goal: secure familial ties that stabilize the emerging dynasty
arc_state.contradiction: private family role vs. public significance through marriage
arc_state.change_vector: from daughter of caudillo to queen-consort figure in dynastic narrative
